name: Thai Limited Company
description: The Thai Limited Company is the most popular and versatile business structure in Thailand, commonly chosen by both local and foreign entrepreneurs.

name: Representative Office
description: A Representative Office is ideal for foreign companies looking to establish a non-trading office in Thailand to oversee business activities such as marketing, research, and quality control.

name: Branch Office
description: A Branch Office allows foreign companies to conduct business operations in Thailand, directly engaging in commercial activities under the name of the parent company.

name: BOI-Promoted Company
description: A BOI-Promoted Company benefits from the incentives provided by the Board of Investment (BOI) in Thailand, making it an attractive option for businesses in certain industries.
